query: Shape a search feature for an index page. Start from requirements, propose two competing options, run a coverage check, and identify what still needs spikes before we can decide.
expected_behavior: Uses shaping notation with requirements and options rather than jumping directly to implementation tasks
Introduces at least two distinct solution options or option components with concrete approaches
Produces a coverage check that compares options against requirements
Calls out open questions or spikes instead of pretending unknowns are solved
